batch: Batch121 — Full Verify Chain Stability & Cache Hygiene
problem: Batch120 one-command verify could time out in constrained runs when raw Next build entered optimized build and generated heavy .next/cache/webpack packs; raw build evidence should remain strict while reducing cache-related instability.
controls: Disable webpack filesystem cache in next.config.ts for production build diagnostics.
Clean .next/cache before raw build diagnostic starts.
Keep raw build closure strict: only finalized rawNextBuildExitCode 0 counts.
Keep hosted closure strict: GIAOAN_DEMO_URL smoke is still required for hosted proof.
Do not add AI, payment, marketplace, verified fake data, or community auto-publish.
